steps.title: Identify the explanation
steps.content: The first clause says Vermelha Beach has sand of a strikingly different shade. The following clause explains why: most sand gets its color from quartz and feldspar, but Vermelha Beach's sand gets a red tint from iron oxide and organic matter.

steps.title: Use an explanatory colon
steps.content: A creates a comma splice. B incorrectly interrupts though most with a comma. D leaves Most sand gets its shade disconnected from the contrast. A colon correctly introduces the explanation of the different shade. The answer is C.
